topics.title: Don Imus Firing
topics.summary: The studio discusses the firing of Don Imus, criticizing his history of racism and unprofessional behavior while dismissing his claims regarding future employment opportunities.

topics.title: Howard Stern Confronts Imus's Behavior
topics.summary: The studio records a heated discussion regarding the controversial actions of radio personality Imus, specifically focusing on his treatment of hospital staff and his disparaging remarks toward Howard Stern's girlfriend.

topics.title: Phil Imus Firing and Radio Industry Shifts
topics.summary: The studio discusses the fallout of Phil Imus's firing due to his offensive remarks, the rise of satellite radio over terrestrial broadcasting, and various reactions from listeners.

topics.title: Radio Industry Dynamics and Celebrity Racing
topics.summary: The studio discusses the evolution of shock radio, the career of Don Imus, and a celebrity's experience at a racing event.

topics.title: Robin's Racing Training and Howard TV Updates
topics.summary: The studio discusses Robin's experience in a recent race, the production of various Howard TV segments, and upcoming guest appearances.

topics.title: David Arquette and Marriage
topics.summary: The studio features David Arquette discussing his marriage to Courtney Cox, their relationship's history, and the impact of tabloid rumors.

topics.title: David Arquette's Film The Tripper
topics.summary: The studio features David Arquette discussing his new psychedelic horror film, his personal life with Courtney Cox, and his past experiences with substance use.

topics.title: Drug Use and Comedy Career
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with comedian Jackie Mason, who discusses his long career in stand-up comedy, his views on other comedians like Chris Rock, and the themes of his new book.

topics.title: Jackie Mason Discusses Book and Celebrity Critiques
topics.summary: The show features Jackie Mason discussing his new book, "Schmucks," while critiquing various public figures including Bill Maher, Paul McCartney, and Katie Couric.

topics.title: Comedy Career and Weight Loss Contest
topics.summary: The studio features a guest discussing his career in comedy and the release of Jackie Mason's book before transitioning into a discussion about local radio figures and a staff weight loss competition.

topics.title: Weight Loss Competition and Celebrity Interviews
topics.summary: The show features a weight loss competition involving participants Benji, Scott, and Arty, followed by various interviews with figures including Billy West, Eric Roberts, and Robert Beltran.

topics.title: Chiller Theater Convention and Celebrity Interviews
topics.summary: The studio features a segment from a live broadcast at the Chiller Theater toy model and film expo, followed by news updates regarding Robin Quivers' racing experience, celebrity interviews with David Arquette and Jackie Mason, and discussions on upcoming competition weigh-ins.

topics.title: Don Ho's Passing and Media Impact
topics.summary: The studio discusses the death of Hawaiian musician Don Ho, the growth of satellite radio for artists like Tommy Shaw and Jack Blades, and various pop culture topics including The Sopranos and recent news headlines.

topics.title: Pop Culture and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses a variety of topics including racial slurs in media, political endorsements from celebrities like Warren Buffett and Donald Trump, and various entertainment news stories involving figures such as Artie Lange and Michael Jackson.

topics.title: Pop Culture and Current Events Roundup
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including Michael Jackson's parenting, the conflict in Iraq, Jackie Robinson's legacy, film reviews for "Disturbia" and "Grindhouse," and various celebrity news segments.
